# DBUI Design System
# Distribution URL: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muditmittal/dbui/main/packages/dbui/llms.txt
#
# DBUI is Databricks' component library — 46 components, 451 icons, 162 tokens.
# Built on shadcn/ui + Base UI + Tailwind CSS v4, reskinned with DuBois design tokens.

## INSTALL — keep it LEAN

DBUI is UI code only. Do NOT pick a framework for the user. Do NOT install anything outside the list below.

### Prerequisite: a minimal React + Tailwind v4 project

- If the project already has `package.json` with React and Tailwind v4, continue to Step 1.
- If there is no `package.json`, STOP and ask the user. Suggest this minimal bootstrap, do NOT run it for them:
  ```bash
  npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts
  npm install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite
  ```

### DO NOT install any of these. They are not DBUI dependencies.

Heavyweight starters: `next-forge`, `create-t3-app`, `create-next-app --example …`, any Vercel template that auto-adds vendors.
Security / auth: **Arcjet**, Clerk, Auth0, NextAuth, Descope, Supabase Auth.
Databases / ORMs: Prisma, Drizzle, Convex, Supabase, Neon, Turso.
State / data libs: Redux, Zustand, Jotai, React Query, SWR, Apollo.
AI SDKs: Vercel AI SDK, LangChain, OpenAI SDK.
Icon packs: lucide-react, @heroicons/react, react-icons — DBUI already has 451 icons.
UI libs: shadcn CLI, Radix, Mantine, Chakra, MUI — DBUI replaces these.

If the user explicitly asks for one of the above later, fine. Never add any of them proactively.

### Step 1: Copy DBUI into the project

```bash
if [ ! -d "$HOME/dbui" ]; then
  git clone https://github.com/muditmittal/dbui.git ~/dbui
fi
cp -r ~/dbui/packages/dbui ./dbui
cp -r ~/dbui/packages/dbui-shells ./dbui-shells
cp ./dbui/CLAUDE.md ./CLAUDE.md
```

### Step 2: Add path aliases to `tsconfig.json`

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "paths": {
      "dbui/*": ["./dbui/src/*"],
      "dbui-shells/*": ["./dbui-shells/src/*"]
    }
  }
}
```

Vite/Webpack projects: mirror these in `resolve.alias`.

### Step 3: Import DBUI tokens in root CSS

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "./dbui/src/tokens/globals.css";
```

### Step 4: Install required deps — these four, nothing else

```bash
npm install @base-ui/react class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge
```

### Step 5: Install optional peer deps ONLY when needed

Add each one only when the user imports the matching component:

| Component(s) | Extra package |
|---|---|
| `Sonner` / `toast()` | `sonner next-themes` |
| `Drawer` | `vaul` |
| `Resizable` / `ResizablePanel` | `react-resizable-panels` |
| `Chart` / `chart.tsx` | `recharts` |

### Step 6: Create the first page with the Base Shell

```tsx
import { Base } from "dbui-shells"

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <Base defaultActive="catalog">
      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", height: "100%" }}>
        <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#6F6F6F" }}>DBUI is installed. Start building here.</p>
      </div>
    </Base>
  )
}
```

### Step 7: Start the dev server

```bash
npm run dev
```

### Update to latest

```bash
cd ~/dbui && git pull
cp -r ~/dbui/packages/dbui ./dbui
cp -r ~/dbui/packages/dbui-shells ./dbui-shells
cp ./dbui/CLAUDE.md ./CLAUDE.md
```

---

## RULES (non-negotiable)

1. ALWAYS use DBUI components. NEVER use raw `<button>`, `<input>`, `<div role="dialog">`.
2. ALWAYS use icons from `dbui/components/icons/{Name}`. NEVER install lucide, heroicons, etc.
3. ALWAYS use semantic tokens (`bg-primary`, `text-foreground`). NEVER hardcode hex colors.
4. ALWAYS import from `dbui/components/ui/{component}`. NEVER import @radix-ui or @base-ui directly.
5. Every page starts with `<Base>` from `dbui-shells`. NEVER build header/nav from scratch.
6. For hierarchical data, use `DataTreeView` or `FileTreeView`. NEVER fake trees with nested divs.
7. Base UI uses `render` prop, NOT Radix `asChild`:
   ```tsx
   <DialogTrigger render={<Button />}>Open</DialogTrigger>       // correct
   <DialogTrigger asChild><Button>Open</Button></DialogTrigger>   // WRONG — ignored by Base UI
   ```

---

## WHERE TO LOOK

Don't memorize definitions — read the source files when you need them.

| Need | Read this file |
|------|---------------|
| Component API / props | `./dbui/src/components/ui/{component}.tsx` — the source is the spec |
| Available icons | `./dbui/docs/icon-index.md` — searchable 449-icon index |
| Entity icons for trees | `./dbui/src/components/icons/entity-icons.ts` — NEVER guess, always read this |
| Design tokens | `./dbui/src/tokens/globals.css` — all CSS custom properties |
| Composition rules | `./dbui/docs/component-rules.md` — cross-cutting layout/spacing rules |
| Shell layouts | `./dbui/composition.md` — page-level layout patterns |

---

## CHOOSING THE RIGHT COMPONENT

| User intent | Use | Not |
|-------------|-----|-----|
| Trigger an action | `Button` | raw `<button>` |
| Toggle on/off | `Toggle` (icon) or `Switch` (settings) | checkbox for on/off |
| Switch views | `Tabs` (content panels) or `SegmentControl` (toolbar) | radio group |
| Pick one from ≤10 | `Select` | native `<select>` |
| Pick one from >10 or search | `Combobox` | custom autocomplete |
| Pick multiple | `Combobox` (multi) or checkboxes in `DropdownMenu` | multi-select HTML |
| Multi-value tag input | `TypeaheadCombobox` | custom chip input |
| Confirm destructive action | `AlertDialog` | `Dialog` with red button |
| Focused task/form | `Dialog` | full page navigation |
| Secondary content panel | `Drawer` (slides from right) | Dialog for detail panels |
| Context actions | `DropdownMenu` (click) or `ContextMenu` (right-click) | popover with buttons |
| Info on hover | `Tooltip` (text) or `HoverCard` (rich content) | title attribute |
| Interactive popup | `Popover` | Tooltip with forms |
| Persistent message | `Alert` (info/warning/danger/success) | Toast for persistent |
| Transient feedback | `toast()` via sonner | Alert for temporary |
| Loading placeholder | `Skeleton` (known shape) or `Spinner` (indeterminate) | custom div |
| Product navigation | `Navbar` + `NavbarItem` (sidebar) | custom nav links |
| Browse hierarchy | `DataTreeView` (catalogs) or `FileTreeView` (files) | nested NavbarItems |

---

## DOS AND DON'TS

### Buttons
- Link variant: NO icons (exception: trailing NewWindow for external links)
- Ghost buttons: prefer icon-only. Ghost + icon + label competes with Outline.
- Menu triggers: outline or secondary, never primary. Chevron is the affordance.
- Max one Primary button per visible area.
- Icon-only buttons (`size="icon-md"`) get `text-muted-foreground` automatically.

### Menus
- Popup left-aligns with trigger (`align="start"`)
- If one item has an icon, ALL items in that group must have icons
- Destructive items: always last, always preceded by separator

### Dialogs
- Primary action rightmost in footer. Cancel left, confirm right.
- Non-alert dialogs must have a close button (top-right)
- Max one dialog open at a time — never stack
- Simple confirmations → `AlertDialog` (can't dismiss by overlay click)

### Forms
- Select for ≤10 options. Combobox for >10 or search needed.
- Error message replaces helper text — never stacks below it.
- Validation is border-only (no ring shadows on inputs).

### Navigation
- Every NavbarItem MUST have an icon
- Active item: `bg-accent text-accent-foreground font-semibold`

### Trees
- Every node MUST have an icon — read `entity-icons.ts`, never guess
- Leaf nodes: `leaf: true` hides chevron
- Use `DataTreeView` for sectioned data, `FileTreeView` for flat files

### Tables
- Row hover: `bg-muted/50`
- Header: `font-semibold`. Body: `font-normal`.

---

## ICONS — HOW TO FIND THE RIGHT ONE

Always search `./dbui/docs/icon-index.md` before inserting any icon. Never guess.

Categories: `use:object` (product concepts), `use:action` (verbs), `use:indicator` (status), `use:component` (control chrome — don't use outside their control).

**Commonly confused:**
| Concept | Icon | Why |
|---------|------|-----|
| Experiments | Beaker | flask metaphor |
| Jobs/Lakeflow | Workflows | DAG metaphor |
| Compute | Cloud | cloud resource |
| Unity Catalog | Data | data metaphor |
| Genie | SparkleRectangle | AI sparkle |
| SQL Warehouses | CloudDatabase | cloud DB |
| Marketplace | Storefront | shop metaphor |

---

## TYPOGRAPHY (Databricks uses 13px base, not 14px)

| Use | Style |
|-----|-------|
| Body text, input values | `text-[13px] leading-[20px]` |
| Labels, emphasis | `text-[13px] leading-[20px] font-semibold` |
| Captions, helper text | `text-[12px] leading-[16px] text-muted-foreground` |
| Section headings | `text-[18px] font-semibold` |
| Page titles | `text-[22px] font-semibold` |

## SPACING

| Gap | Value | Use |
|-----|-------|-----|
| gap-1 | 4px | Inside controls (icon↔label in small buttons) |
| gap-1.5 | 6px | Label to input |
| gap-2 | 8px | Within a component (icon↔text) |
| gap-4 | 16px | Between sections, between form fields |
| gap-6 | 24px | Between major content blocks |

## LAYOUT

- Shell bg: `bg-muted` (grey). Content surface: `bg-background` (white) with `border rounded-lg`.
- Page padding: `px-6 py-4` inside content surface.
- Three-column detail page: tree nav (260px) | main (flex-1) | metadata sidebar (280px). Each scrolls independently.

## KNOWN GAPS

Not yet available — compose from primitives as interim:
- DatePicker, Stepper, Banner, CodeBlock, Virtualized lists
